name: Schylling NeeDoh Nice Ice Baby - Sensory Squeeze Toy - Super Solid Squish - 1.25" Wide - Color May Vary (Pack of 1)
bullets: The chill Nice Cube is back with a brand-new invention
Teenie size with a super solid sensory satisfaction
Colors may vary (blue, pink, purple); 1 cube per pack; 1” square
description: Stop, collaborate, and listen! The makers of NeeDoh are back with a brand-new invention. The satisfying chill of the NeeDoh Nice Cube in teenie size is something you can hold tightly - introducing the NeeDoh Nice Ice Baby! This mini ice cube in a translucent blue color provides a solid squishy experience, and is vibing as a Nice Ice Baby too cool!

reviews.name: Laura P.
reviews.title: It does not live when babies touch it
reviews.body: It was great it piped with in 3 days but my baby brother with no teeth bit it and it popped but he is not hurt it was just very sticky

reviews.name: Paige
reviews.title: Fun Sensory Toy That’s Hard to Put Down
reviews.body: This NeeDoh sensory toy has been a big hit in our house. The texture is incredibly satisfying to squeeze, and it has a unique cool, squishy feel that makes it difficult to put down once you start playing with it.It’s great for keeping hands busy, whether for sensory play, stress relief, or simply fidgeting. The size is convenient for both kids and adults, and it’s easy to take along in a bag or…

reviews.name: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Almost perfect, seal split open
reviews.body: Exactly what I was looking for! Perfect size, perfect squish. It looks like they’ve reinforced the seal so I don’t think it will be popping anytime soon. Will update if it does. Only negative so far is that it does collect a bit of lint and fuzzies however it’s not too bad and not sticky. I’ll be ordering another!EDIT: After just the second day it did split around the seal. However, so far none…

reviews.name: Jen
reviews.title: i love this!! love needohs!!
reviews.body: i love this. i thought it was going to come in in blue, but it came in in pink. i guess that was my fault for not reading where it said “color may vary” or something like that. but it is super fun to play with, but i feel like the bigger ones are better because the small ones are more rubber than actual gel inside. but i still love it! the pink color was great, it wasn’t too sticky and didn’t get…
